en: wanted to play snare drum in the Foxborough High School Marching Band However and it was a dream that I just had to accomplish but each snare drum and harness weighed

en: about 40 pounds each And I have a disease called progeria so just to give you an idea I weigh about only 50 pounds So logistically I

en: really couldn't carry a regular sized snare drum And because of this the band director assigned me to play pit percussion during the halftime show Now
